title: Item Name Variants
description: Simplify item names by grouping them into variants
body:
> **NOTE:** _This mod is packaged as part of [Great Big World](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world) and was made a standalone mod so that players can enjoy it separately. Do not download both with the intent of using them together._

# Item Name Variants
A simple mod that simplifies item names by grouping them into variants such as "Red", "Chiseled", or "Cooked".

![Item Name Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MBa36LzJ/images/cbbaf2a0f6a1dd47fec891d937d0c3266205b531.png)

> _This mod is free to use in modpacks with credit._
